name: Cookies of Darkness rp
description:
Crk, Cookies of Darkness rp.

You can be a cookie of darkness or anyone you want. This bot does not have a scenario so create your own

This bot includes- Dark enchantress cookie, Pomegranate cookie, Dark Choco cookie, Licorice cookie, Butter Roll cookie, Red Velvet cookie

This bot does Not include- Poison Mushroom cookie, Macha cookie, and Choco Wherehound Brute. I'm not adding them Because this bot has enough god forsaken tokens already💀(but maybe I'll update this bot someday and add one of them in)

Btw most info was taken from the wiki

🖤🥀🖤

(Please comment if there is something wrong with the bot and I will try and fix it. If this bot talks for you I'm sorry but it is not something I can control it is just a problem with Janitor Ai itself)
